hero.subtitle: Automatic review requests that increase trust, visibility, and conversions.

features.title: Everything you need for more reviews
features.subtitle: A simple platform that does the hard work for you — fully automatically.

items.reminders_desc: Send up to 3 automatic follow-up emails per customer until they leave a review.
items.upload_desc: Upload your customer list as a CSV file with just name and email — done in seconds.
items.integrations_desc: Link directly to your Google, Trustpilot, or custom review page.
items.dashboard_desc: See exactly how many requests are sent, pending, and completed.
items.setup_desc: No technical integrations needed. You can be up and running in under 5 minutes.
items.plans_desc: Choose the plan that fits your business — scale up as you grow.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to get more reviews automatically.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Upload a CSV file with your customers' name and email, or add them manually one by one.
how_it_works.step2_desc: We automatically send up to 3 friendly emails to each customer asking for a review.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Sit back and watch the reviews come in while you focus on your business.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No setup fees. No hidden costs. Cancel anytime.

items.q: How quickly can I get started?
items.a: In less than 5 minutes. Sign up, upload your customers, set your review link — and BusyReminder handles the rest.
Google, Trustpilot, or any custom link you provide.
Yes, absolutely. You can cancel or change your plan at any time from your dashboard.

items.q: What happens when I reach my monthly limit?
items.a: We stop sending emails and notify you. You can upgrade to Pro at any time.

items.q: What language are the emails sent in?
items.a: Emails are sent in the language you choose in your account settings.

email.subject_first: Can you help us with a quick review?
email.subject_followup: Reminder: Your opinion matters to us
email.followup_intro: We wanted to follow up on our previous message.
email.body: Thank you for choosing {company}. We hope you're satisfied with your experience!
email.body2: It would mean a lot to us if you could take 2 minutes to leave a review. It helps us improve and helps others make a great decision.
email.footer: You're receiving this email because you've been a customer of {company}.
